svg.title: Product Portal physical entity relationship diagram
svg.desc: Twenty-three application tables and twenty-three PostgreSQL foreign-key relationships parsed from backups\productportal-schema.sql.
svg.text: PostgreSQL 17 • public schema • 23 application tables • 23 physical foreign keys • source: backups/productportal-schema.sql
Migration metadata excluded: databasechangelog, databasechangeloglock, flyway_schema_history

g.text: Connector anchors correspond to the actual FK/PK column rows
Audit cards are present but physically disconnected
No true 1:1 relationship exists in this schema
Roles, permissions, scoped grants and organization-aware assignments
Users, memberships, sessions, addresses and login protection
Products, categories, brands and lifecycle reference data
Trigger-maintained history tables; intentionally isolated from the physical FK graph

svg.text: Cardinality is shown from each endpoint’s perspective. Solid FK = identifying (FK columns participate in child PK); dashed FK = non-identifying. Audit history tables define no physical foreign keys.
